final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial sports photo capturing an NBA Finals highlight moment — a No. 23 jersey superstar rising above two defenders for a thunderous slam dunk.

Style/medium: photorealistic sports photography, high-speed freeze-frame at 1/2000s shutter speed, sharp with zero motion blur, in the tradition of elite sports photojournalism
Composition: low-angle upward shot emphasizing the player's height and explosive power, wide-to-normal lens, shallow depth of field with the packed arena crowd rendered as a spectacular bokeh backdrop
Subject: a basketball superstar wearing jersey number 23, caught mid-air between two opposing defenders attempting a double-team; body traces a perfect athletic arc in flight, muscle definition clearly visible under arena lighting, facial expression radiating explosive intensity and laser focus
Scene/backdrop: NBA Finals arena at peak game moment, tens of thousands of fans on their feet cheering, camera flashes scattered across the stands like a sea of stars; hardwood court floor with court boundary lines and brand logos sharply visible in the foreground
Lighting/mood: professional multi-point high-intensity arena lighting with consistent color temperature, even illumination across the court surface, dramatic upward light sculpting the player's physique; atmosphere electric and triumphant
Color palette: warm amber hardwood floor as base, vivid jersey colors as focal anchor, cool white arena lights contrasting with warm crowd glow, scattered white flash bursts across the dark upper stands
Materials/textures: glossy hardwood floor reflections, fabric texture of the jersey, sweat sheen on exposed skin, crisp painted court markings
Avoid: motion blur, soft focus on the player, deformed limbs or hands, generic stock-photo composition, artificial-looking crowd, color grading inconsistency between floor and stands
